entry.title: IDC N0001908D0014 (P00018) awarded to L-3 COMMUNICATIONS VERTEX AEROSPACE LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCREASE THE SCOPE OF THE CURRENT DIMINISHING MANUFACTURING SOURCES AND MATERIAL SHORTAGES SUPPORT ON THE L-3 T-45 AIRCRAFT CONTRACTOR LOGISTICS SUPPORT(CLS) CONTRACT, CLIN 0412 TO INCLUDE DELIVERY OF A DMSMS MANAGEMENT PLAN, BILL OF MATERIAS A LISTS AND ADD ADDITIONAL CDRL REQUIREMENTS TO EXHIBIT A.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC N0001908D0014 (P00019) awarded to L-3 COMMUNICATIONS VERTEX AEROSPACE LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD SLINS 0301AX, 0301AY, 0302AW, 0302AX, 0401AX, 0401AY, 0402AW AND 0402AX; MODIFY FLIGHT HOURS FROM 6,754 TO 3,300 FOR SLINS 0401AR THRU 0401AV; ADD DESCRIPTION OF CONTRACT LINE ITEMS FOR 0301XX AND 0401XX; UNDER ATTACHMENT 1, PWS AT SECTION 4.2.1 ADD TABLE 4-11A AND REVISE LIST OF TABLES.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC N0001908D0014 (P00020) awarded to L-3 COMMUNICATIONS VERTEX AEROSPACE LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXERCISE OPTION YEAR 4 CLINS FOR THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE OF 1 OCTOBER 2012- 30 SEPTEMBER 2013. ADDITIONALLY, THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE THE LATEST AREA WAGE DETERMINATIONS AND COLLECTIVE BARGING AGREEMENTS INTO THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC N0001908D0014 (P00022) awarded to L-3 COMMUNICATIONS VERTEX AEROSPACE LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO MODIFY SECTION B FOR THE NAS KINGSVILLE, NAS MERIDIAN, AND NAS PENSACOLA CBA ADJUSTMENT. THE MODIFICATION ALSO ADDS FAR CLAUSE 52.222-17.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

entry.title: IDC N0001908D0014 (P00023) awarded to L-3 COMMUNICATIONS VERTEX AEROSPACE LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXERCISE FAR 52.217-8 OPTION TO EXTEND SERVICES BY ADDING CLINS 0501 THROUGH 0520. THE EXERCISE OF THIS CLAUSE EXTENDS THE ORDERING PERIOD FOR 6 ADDITIONAL MONTHS. FUNDING WILL BE PROVIDED BY EXECUTING FUTURE DELIVERY ORDERS. ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN IN FULL EFFECT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC N0001908D0014 (P00024) awarded to L-3 COMMUNICATIONS VERTEX AEROSPACE LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE OPTION CLIN 0518AA-AJ "SURGE CAPABILITY PER DAY" INTO THE CONTRACT. FUNDING WILL BE PROVIDED BY EXECUTING FUTURE DELIVERY ORDERS. A MINOR CORRECTION WAS MADE TO THE SECTION B DESCRIPTION OF CLIN 0507AB. ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN IN FULL EFFECT.
IN ADDITION, THE "SUMMARY OF CHANGES" ON PAGES 46 THROUGH 90 OF P00023 ARE A DUPLICATE OF SECTION B "SUPPLIES AND SERVICES". PLEASE DISREGARD THIS DUPLICATE SECTION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MAINT/REPAIR/REBUILD OF EQUIPMENT- AIRCRAFT AND AIRFRAME STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC N0001908D0014 (P00026) awarded to L-3 COMMUNICATIONS VERTEX AEROSPACE LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ESTABLISH CLIN 0521 IN ORDER TO RESOLVE THE L-3 COMMUNICATIONS VERTEX AEROSPACE LLC REQUEST FOR EQUITABLE ADJUSTMENT.
